props.label: Validate credentials
props.comment: Uses constant-time comparison to prevent timing attacks.
props.story: Fetches the user record and compares the submitted password against the stored hash.

props.label: Issue session token
props.comment: Signs a JWT and persists it in Redis with a 7-day TTL.
props.story: The session token is returned in the response body and cached for fast validation on future requests.

props.label: Session issued
props.body: A signed JWT is returned in the `200 OK` response body. The session is cached in Redis with a 7-day TTL. Subsequent requests validate the token directly from cache.
